description_long: This electric drill features a robust, industrial design with a predominantly yellow-orange body and black accents. The main housing is constructed from a hard, durable material, likely metal or reinforced plastic, with a cylindrical black section at the rear and a metallic chuck at the front. Two prominent black handles curve along the sides, providing ergonomic grip and control. A circular gauge or dial is visible on the top, possibly for monitoring speed or torque. The front end is open, with no drill bit currently attached, and the rear section appears ribbed for added grip or heat dissipation. The overall appearance suggests a heavy-duty tool suitable for construction or repair work in urban environments.
description: A heavy-duty yellow-orange electric drill with black handles, a metallic front chuck, and a visible top gauge. The tool is robust and lacks an attached drill bit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yellow-orange body, black ribbed rear, curved black handle, and top gauge.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open metallic chuck, symmetrical black handles, and the absence of a drill bit.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, showing the handle and ribbed rear section.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the circular gauge on top and the wide, ribbed black rear section.
